name: Root Certificate Installed
notes: This rule detects adversaries installing a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via CertMgr
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via Certutil
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via CertMgr, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via Certutil
TD_list: APPLY Root Certificate Installed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via CertMgr, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Root Certificate Installed via Certutil
RED_list: Event description: Detects adversaries installing a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
